title: Haldi Doodh (Turmeric Milk)
imageAlt: A cup of turmeric milk (haldi doodh)
description: A warm, comforting turmeric milk — India's original bedtime remedy.

ingredients.text: 1 tsp honey or jaggery, to taste

steps: Pour the milk into a saucepan and place over medium heat.
Add the Turmeric Powder, crushed ginger and black pepper.
Whisk gently and bring to a soft simmer, stirring occasionally so it doesn't catch at the bottom.
Simmer for 5-6 minutes to let the spices infuse into the milk.
Strain into cups, sweeten with honey or jaggery, and serve warm.

seo.title: Haldi Doodh Recipe (Turmeric Milk) | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make authentic Haldi Doodh (turmeric milk) at home using Mom Masale Turmeric Powder. A simple, soothing recipe for every season.

title: Chicken Biryani
description: Layered, fragrant chicken biryani made simple with Mom Masale Biryani Masala.

ingredients.text: A few strands saffron soaked in warm milk (optional)

steps: Marinate the chicken with yogurt, Biryani Masala, ginger-garlic paste and salt for at least 30 minutes.
Parboil the soaked rice in salted water until 70% cooked, then drain.
In a heavy-bottomed pot, cook the marinated chicken in ghee until nearly done and the masala coats the pieces.
Layer the parboiled rice over the chicken, top with fried onions, coriander, mint and saffron milk.
Cover tightly and cook on low heat (dum) for 20-25 minutes.
Rest for 5 minutes before gently mixing and serving hot.

seo.title: Chicken Biryani Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Make restaurant-style chicken biryani at home with Mom Masale Biryani Masala. Step-by-step recipe for a fragrant, layered biryani.

title: Masala Chai
description: The classic Indian spiced tea, made the way mom makes it.
steps: Bring the water to a boil in a saucepan.
Add the tea leaves and Chai Masala, and let it boil for 1-2 minutes.
Pour in the milk and bring the mixture back to a boil.
Simmer for 3-4 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the chai turns a rich golden-brown.
Add sugar or jaggery to taste, strain into cups, and serve hot.

seo.title: Masala Chai Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: How to make authentic masala chai at home using Mom Masale Chai Masala. A quick, comforting Indian spiced tea recipe.

title: Mutton Curry
description: A rich, slow-cooked mutton curry built around Mom Masale Meat Masala.
steps: Heat oil in a heavy pot and fry the onions until golden brown.
Add ginger-garlic paste and cook until the raw smell disappears.
Add the mutton pieces and sear on high heat for 5-6 minutes.
Stir in the Meat Masala and tomato puree, and cook until the oil separates.
Add water as needed, cover, and simmer on low heat for 35-40 minutes until the mutton is tender.
Garnish with fresh coriander and serve hot with rice or roti.

seo.title: Mutton Curry Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: A rich, home-style mutton curry recipe made with Mom Masale Meat Masala. Simple steps for tender, flavourful mutton.

title: Shahi Paneer
description: A creamy, royal-style paneer curry made easy with Mom Masale Shahi Paneer Masala.
steps: Heat ghee in a pan and sauté the onion puree until golden.
Add ginger-garlic paste and cook for a minute until fragrant.
Stir in the Shahi Paneer Masala and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the cashew paste or cream along with a splash of water, and simmer until the gravy thickens.
Gently fold in the paneer cubes, season with salt and a pinch of sugar, and simmer for 3-4 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with a swirl of cream, alongside naan or rice.

seo.title: Shahi Paneer Recipe | Mom Masale
seo.metaDescription: Make creamy, restaurant-style Shahi Paneer at home with Mom Masale Shahi Paneer Masala. Easy step-by-step recipe.
